project.title: immunoprecipitation coupled with a mass spectrometry (MS) approach to identify cellular proteins associated with MOV10
project.projectDescription: To understand the detailed mechanism underlying MOV10-mediated restriction of LINE-1 retrotransposition, we first performed immunoprecipitation coupled with a mass spectrometry (MS) approach to identify cellular proteins associated with MOV10.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Flag-tagged MOV10 was expressed in HEK293T cells and then immunoprecipitated with a Flag-specific antibody or a IgG antibody, followed by MS analysis of the immunoprecipitated materials.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: We reanalysis the data of IP-MS, classifying the proteins into three groups: control sample specific, Flag-MOV10 sample specific and overlaps of the two samples, showing in Venn diagram. The 173 proteins present in Flag-MOV10 sample only were sorted by intensity and the 134 proteins overlap of two samples were sequenced by fold change in heatmap.Gene ontology (GO) analysis and Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) analysis were conducted.
